Who We Are

Derby-Grown.
Detail-Obsessed.

My name is Dee Minnis V. I live on Persimmon Street and I'm proud to serve Derby, Kansas. I take pride in doing every job right the first time. When you hire Minnis Mowing Co., you're getting attention to detail, consistency, and someone who truly cares about your yard.

I show up on time, work hard, and treat every lawn like it's my own.

✦ Owner-Operated · Derby, Kansas

What We Do

Services Built on
Precision

01
Lawn Mowing

Clean, consistent cuts on every visit. We mow to the right height for your grass type and season, leaving your lawn looking sharp and healthy every time.

02
Edging & Trimming

Crisp lines along driveways, sidewalks, and fences — paired with precise trimming around obstacles so every inch of your yard looks finished.

03
Mulching

Instead of bagging your clippings, we finely shred them and blow them back into the lawn as natural fertilizer — feeding your grass and reducing waste at the same time.

04
Regular Maintenance

Scheduled weekly or bi-weekly visits so your lawn stays sharp all season. We show up reliably and treat your property like it's our own.
